name: Isicelo seTourniquet (ITourniquet yeSicelo sokuLwa -- CAT)
description: Ulawulo oluqinisekileyo lokopha ukopha okusongela ubomi. Faka isicelo kwangethuba -- sukulibazisa.
steps: Faka i-tourniquet 2-3 intshi (5-7 cm) proximal (ngaphezulu) kwenxeba -- ngaphezulu kwempahla yamkelekile.
Jikelezisa ibhendi ebambelelayo kwilungu kwaye uthulule kwibhanti yeadaptha yokukhuhlana.
Tsala ibhendi ngokuqinileyo kwaye uyikhusele kwakhona ngokwayo.
Jija intonga yomoya de kuphele ukopha okanye i-distal pulse ingabikho.
Faka intambo yomoya phezu kwentonga yomoya ukuze ukhuseleke.
Bhala ixesha lesicelo ngokuthe ngqo kwi-tourniquet (sebenzisa isiphawuli) KUNYE nakwikhadi le-TCCC.
Veza kwaye uphinde uvavanye inxeba. Phinda uhlole emva kwemizuzu emi-5.
warnings: MUSA ukususa i-tourniquet xa sele ifakiwe endle -- kuphela ngabasebenzi bezonyango abaqeqeshiweyo kwindawo elawulwayo.
Ixesha libaluleke kakhulu: i-tourniquet> iiyure ze-2 zandisa kakhulu ingozi yokulahleka kwemilenze. Log ixesha ngoko nangoko.
MUSA ukufaka isicelo phezu kwendawo edibeneyo. Ukuba ilungu linamanxeba kumanqanaba amaninzi, sebenzisa i-proximal kuwo onke amanxeba.

pediatric.note: Sebenzisa i-tourniquet yabantwana emxinwa ukuba ikhona. I-CAT eqhelekileyo ingasetyenziswa kodwa qina ngononophelo. Amalungu mancinci -- jonga i-distal pulse ngononophelo.

obstetric.note: Ukusetyenziswa okusemgangathweni kwamanxeba aphelile. Musa ukusebenzisa isisu okanye i-pelvis.
